entries.name: Farsi Default Voice
entries.referenceText: Ma nagyon szép az idő, ezért később elmegyek sétálni egyet a közeli parkba.
entries.description: Default Persian reference voice used for FA dubbing.

entries.name: Chinese
entries.referenceText: 这个周末我打算在家里安静地看电影，哪里都不去，只想好好休息
entries.description: Example English reference entry for future multilingual pipelines.

entries.name: Best english voice
entries.referenceText: I guess It's a decent model, and the point of this is that you can mock up a design. So, I might make this video with Veo 3.1 Lite, and then once I get it right and sort of storyboard it, then I can use a better video generation model like Veo 3.1 Quality for the final product.

entries.name: Best english voice but short
entries.referenceText: Today I will explain each step clearly, calmly, and at a steady pace.

entries.name: Best english voice but midium
entries.referenceText: Hi there, thanks for joining me today. I’ll explain each step clearly and keep the pace smooth, natural, and easy to follow.

entries.name: Best english voice but small
entries.referenceText: Follow along as I explain each part with precise words and steady timing.

entries.name: Best english voice but x small
entries.referenceText: I sound warm and friendly.

entries.name: Spanish
entries.referenceText: Hoy el clima está súper bonito, así que más tarde iré a caminar un rato por el parque.

entries.name: Portuguese
entries.referenceText: Hoje o tempo está muito bom, por isso vou dar uma caminhada pelo parque mais tarde.

entries.name: fr-mine.wav
entries.referenceText: Dans cette section, vous apprendre de nouvelles choses.

entries.name: Best arabic voice
entries.referenceText: في هذا القسم، ستتعرف على خيارات جديدة

entries.name: Russian
entries.referenceText: Сегодня, к сожалению, идет очень сильный дождь

entries.name: Hindi
entries.referenceText: आज, मुझे महसूस हो रहा है कि हमें इस काम को मिलकर पूरा करना चाहिए

entries.name: Japanese
entries.referenceText: 今日は天気がとても良いので、外で元気に遊びたいと思ってます。

entries.name: Korean
entries.referenceText: 저는 매일 아침 일찍 일어나서, 따뜻한 차를 마셔요.

entries.name: German
entries.referenceText: Lernen macht viel mehr Spaß, wenn man jeden Tag ein kleines bisschen Zeit zum Üben findet.

entries.name: Italian
entries.referenceText: Ieri sono andato al parco con i miei amici e ci siamo divertiti molto.

entries.name: Indonesian
entries.referenceText: Masakan Indonesia sangat enak, terutama nasi goreng dan sate ayam yang bumbunya sangat pas.

entries.name: Dutch (Netherlands)
entries.referenceText: Het weer is vandaag echt prachtig, dus ik ga zometeen een lange wandeling in het park maken.

entries.name: Turkish
entries.referenceText: Dün hava çok güzeldi, bu yüzden arkadaşımla parka gidip uzun bir yürüyüş yaptık.

entries.name: Thai
entries.referenceText: เมื่อวานนี้ฉันไปเดินเล่นที่สวนสาธารณะกับเพื่อนมา สนุกมากเลยค่ะ

entries.name: Vietnamese
entries.referenceText: Học tiếng Việt tuy có hơi khó một chút nhưng mà nó rất là thú vị và hay.

entries.name: Malayalam
entries.referenceText: എനിക്ക് മലയാളം സംസാരിക്കാൻ വലിയ ഇഷ്ടമാണ്, പക്ഷേ അത് പഠിക്കാൻ കുറച്ച് പ്രയാസമാണ്.

entries.name: pl-mine-5.mp3
entries.referenceText: Chciałbym zamówić dużą czarną kawę oraz kawałek sernika na deser.

entries.name: ta-mine.mp3
entries.referenceText: நேத்து நான் என்னோட நண்பர்களோட பூங்காவுக்கு போனேன், அங்க ரொம்ப ஜாலியா இருந்துச்சு.

entries.name: Ukrainian
entries.referenceText: Мені потрібно купити декілька продуктів у магазині біля дому

entries.name: Bengali
entries.referenceText: আজকের আবহাওয়া খুব সুন্দর, তাই আমি বিকেলে পার্কে হাঁটতে যাবো।

entries.name: Telugu
entries.referenceText: ఈరోజు వాతావరణం చాలా బాగుంది, అందుకే నేను సాయంత్రం పార్కుకు వెళ్తాను.

entries.name: Punjabi
entries.referenceText: ਮੈਨੂੰ ਪੰਜਾਬੀ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਬਹੁਤ ਪਸੰਦ ਹੈ, ਪਰ ਇਸ ਨੂੰ ਸਿੱਖਣਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਲਈ ਥੋੜ੍ਹਾ ਜਿਹਾ ਔਖਾ ਹੈ।

entries.name: Serbian
entries.referenceText: Danas je veoma lepo vreme, pa ću popodne ići u šetnju parkom.

entries.name: Urdu
entries.referenceText: آج موسم بہت پیارا ہے، اس لیے میں شام کو پارک میں سیر کے لیے جاؤں گا۔

entries.name: Norwegian
entries.referenceText: Været er veldig fint i dag, så jeg skal gå en tur i parken senere.

entries.name: Catalan
entries.referenceText: Avui fa molt bon temps, així que aniré a fer un tomb pel centre de la ciutat.

entries.name: Croatian
entries.referenceText: Danas je jako lijepo vrijeme, pa ću popodne ići u šetnju parkom.

entries.name: Lithuanian
entries.referenceText: Šiandien lauke labai gražus oras, todėl vėliau eisiu pasivaikščioti į parką.

entries.name: Slovak
entries.referenceText: Dnes je vonku veľmi pekne, preto sa pôjdem poobede prejsť do parku.

entries.name: Swedish
entries.referenceText: Vädret är verkligen jättefint i dag, så jag tänkte gå på en promenad i parken.

entries.name: Greek
entries.referenceText: Ο καιρός είναι πολύ καλός σήμερα, οπότε θα πάω μια βόλτα στο πάρκο αργότερα.

entries.name: Bulgarian
entries.referenceText: Днес времето е много хубаво, затова ще отида на разходка в парка.

entries.name: Kinyarwanda
entries.referenceText: Uyu munsi kirashyushye cyane, niyo mpamvu nshaka kujya gutembera mu busitani.

entries.name: Belarusian
entries.referenceText: Сёння вельмі добрае надвор'е, таму я пайду на шпацыр у парк.

entries.name: Danish
entries.referenceText: Vejret er virkelig dejligt i dag, så jeg vil gå en tur i parken senere.

entries.name: Kazakh
entries.referenceText: Бүгін күн өте ашық, сондықтан мен кешке паркте серуендеймін.

entries.name: Latvian
entries.referenceText: Šodien ir ļoti skaists laiks, tāpēc es vēlāk iešu pastaigāties pa parku.

entries.name: Esperanto
entries.referenceText: Hodiaŭ la vetero estas tre bela, do mi iros por promeni en la parko.

entries.name: Slovenian
entries.referenceText: Danes je zelo lepo vreme, zato bom šel popoldne na sprehod v park.

entries.name: Estonian
entries.referenceText: Täna on väga ilus ilm, seega ma lähen hiljem parki jalutama.

entries.name: Bosnian
entries.referenceText: Danas je jako lijepo vrijeme, pa ću popodne ići u šetnju parkom.

entries.name: Icelandic
entries.referenceText: Værið er virkilega gott í dag, svo ég ætla að fara í smá göngutúr í garðinum.

entries.name: Maltese
entries.referenceText: Illum it-temp huwa sabiħ ħafna, għalhekk se mmur nagħmel mixja żgħira fil-ġnien.

entries.name: Basque
entries.referenceText: Gaur eguraldi oso ona egiten du, beraz, arratsaldean parkera joango naiz buelta bat ematera.

entries.name: Finnish
entries.referenceText: Tänään on todella kaunis sää, joten aion mennä myöhemmin puistoon kävelylle.

entries.name: Ganda
entries.referenceText: Lelo obudde bulungi nnyo, kyo kiva nnyagala okugendako mu kisaawe okutambulamu.

entries.name: Swahili
entries.referenceText: Leo hali ya hewa ni nzuri sana, kwa hivyo nitaenda kutembea bustanini baadaye.

entries.name: Hungarian
entries.referenceText: Ma nagyon szép az idő, ezért később elmegyek sétálni egyet a közeli parkba.
